title: Coding Agents
description: Coding-agent observability across vendors (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot CLI). Sessions, cost, tools, users, classification, and governance — sourced live from otel_traces emitted by the openlit CLI hook.

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111111.title: Total sessions
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111111.description: Distinct coding-agent sessions in the selected window.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_sessions,

    CAST(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_sessions_previous,

    round(
        if(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])) = 0,
           uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])) * 100.0,
           (uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])) -
            uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']))) * 100.0
           / uniqIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']))
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.tool.call', 'coding_agent.edit.decision')
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111112.title: Active users
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111112.description: Distinct users (gen_ai.user.name) who started a coding-agent session.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])
    ) AS INTEGER) AS active_users,

    CAST(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
        AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])
    ) AS INTEGER) AS active_users_previous,

    round(
        if(uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])) = 0,
           uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])) * 100.0,
           (uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])) -
            uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']))) * 100.0
           / uniqIf(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'],
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
               AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name']))
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111113.title: Total cost (USD)
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111113.description: Realized cost from gen_ai.usage.cost emitted on coding-agent sessions.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    round(sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
        Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
        AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')
    ), 4) AS total_cost,

    round(sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
        Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
        AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')
    ), 4) AS total_cost_previous,

    round(
        if(sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')) = 0,
           sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')) * 100.0,
           (sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
               Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
               AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')) -
            sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn'))) * 100.0
           / sumIf(toFloat64OrZero(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.usage.cost']),
               Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
               AND SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn'))
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111114.title: Total tool calls
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa11111114.description: Distinct tool invocations across all coding-agent sessions.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    (end_time - start_time) AS duration,
    (start_time - duration) AS prev_start_time,
    (end_time - duration) AS prev_end_time

SELECT
    CAST(countIf(
        SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
        AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_tools,

    CAST(countIf(
        SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
        AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time
    ) AS INTEGER) AS total_tools_previous,

    round(
        if(countIf(SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
               AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time) = 0,
           countIf(SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
               AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) * 100.0,
           (countIf(SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
               AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time) -
            countIf(SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
               AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time)) * 100.0
           / countIf(SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
               AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= prev_end_time)
        ), 4
    ) AS rate
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
    AND Timestamp >= prev_start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222221.title: Sessions over time
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222221.description: Distinct coding-agent sessions bucketed across the window.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time,
    dateDiff('day', start_time, end_time) AS days_diff,
    dateDiff('year', start_time, end_time) AS years_diff,
    multiIf(
        years_diff >= 1, 'month',
        days_diff <= 1, 'hour',
        'day'
    ) AS date_granularity

SELECT
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions,
    formatDateTime(DATE_TRUNC(date_granularity, Timestamp), '%Y/%m/%d %R') AS request_time
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY request_time
ORDER BY request_time

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222222.title: Sessions by vendor
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa22222222.description: Distribution of sessions across coding-agent vendors.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(
        nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.client'], ''),
        SpanAttributes['gen_ai.agent.name']
    ) AS vendor,
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY vendor
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333331.title: Top tools
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa33333331.description: Top tools invoked across coding-agent sessions.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['gen_ai.tool.name'] AS tool,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS calls
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.tool.call'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.tool.name'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY tool
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'] AS user,
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.user.name'])
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY user
ORDER BY sessions DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['vcs.repository.url.full'] AS repo,
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['vcs.repository.url.full'])
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY repo
ORDER BY sessions DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444441.title: Personal vs work classification
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444441.description: Sessions broken down by coding_agent.user.classification (personal | work | disputed | unknown).

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.user.classification'], ''), 'unknown') AS classification,
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY classification
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444442.title: Top models
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa44444442.description: Top LLM models behind coding-agent activity.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'] AS model,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS calls
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName IN ('coding_agent.session', 'coding_agent.tool.call', 'coding_agent.llm.turn')
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['gen_ai.request.model'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 10

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555551.title: Session outcomes
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555551.description: Distribution of session outcomes — merged, committed, abandoned, cancelled.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.outcome'], ''), 'unknown') AS outcome,
    CAST(uniq(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id']) AS INTEGER) AS sessions
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.session'
    AND notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.session.id'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY outcome
ORDER BY sessions DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555552.title: Edit decisions
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555552.description: Auto-applied vs user-reviewed edits — gauge user trust in the agent.

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.edit.decision'], ''), 'unknown') AS decision,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS edits
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    SpanName = 'coding_agent.edit.decision'
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY decision
ORDER BY edits DESC

9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555553.title: MCP servers in use
9a1f1c20-3b27-4f88-9d51-1aaa55555553.description: Top MCP servers attached to coding-agent runs (governance signal).

config.query:
WITH
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.start}}') AS start_time,
    parseDateTimeBestEffort('{{filter.timeLimit.end}}') AS end_time

SELECT
    SpanAttributes['coding_agent.mcp.server.name'] AS server,
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS invocations
FROM otel_traces
WHERE
    notEmpty(SpanAttributes['coding_agent.mcp.server.name'])
    AND Timestamp >= start_time AND Timestamp <= end_time
GROUP BY server
ORDER BY invocations DESC
LIMIT 10
